control.rationale: Excellent comparison with use cases and a summary table.

fable_compressed.rationale: Clear and concise breakdown matching Control.

fable_raw.rationale: Accurate prose-only explanation of the three real-time protocols.

fable_innovations.rationale: Incredible analysis bringing up WebTransport (HTTP/3) as a future disruptor, and identifying a B2B opportunity in building a unified real-time infrastructure router.
